impact: npm audit --omit=dev reports GHSA-qx2v-qp2m-jg93 through next/node_modules/postcss for the current Next 16 dependency range. The npm suggested audit fix --force would install an inappropriate breaking Next version, so this needs a deliberate Next/PostCSS remediation path rather than an automatic audit fix.
resolution: Added an explicit npm override for postcss 8.5.10 and aligned the direct PostCSS devDependency to the same patched version. The regenerated lockfile removes Next's nested postcss 8.4.31 copy, dedupes Next/autoprefixer/tailwind/vite to postcss 8.5.10, and `npm audit --omit=dev` reports 0 vulnerabilities. Tests, typecheck, and staging build pass.
title: Production npm audit flags Next bundled PostCSS advisory
